message:
feat(random,ufunc): expand PRNG subsystem and refine ufunc dispatch

Random (fnp-random):
- Major expansion of the PRNG subsystem (326 new lines) adding new
  distribution samplers, seed management improvements, and statistical
  property validation infrastructure
- Strengthens deterministic reproducibility guarantees for conformance
  testing against NumPy's random module

Ufunc (fnp-ufunc):
- Minor refinements to universal function dispatch and type coercion
  logic (8 lines changed) improving edge-case handling

Evidence artifacts:
- Add unit property evidence packs for FNP-P2C-004, FNP-P2C-005,
  and FNP-P2C-007 phase2c conformance milestones

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

+  ],

+    {

+    {
+      "command": "rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets",
+      "result": "pass"
+    },
+    {
+      "command": "rch exec -- cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings",
+      "result": "pass"
+    },
+    {
+      "command": "ubs --only=rust crates/fnp-iter/src/lib.rs",
+      "result": "pass",
+      "critical_findings": 0
+    }
+  ],
+  "artifacts": [
+    "crates/fnp-iter/src/lib.rs",
+    "artifacts/phase2c/FNP-P2C-004/contract_table.md",
+    "artifacts/phase2c/FNP-P2C-004/implementation_plan.md",
+    "artifacts/phase2c/FNP-P2C-004/unit_property_evidence.json"
+  ],
+  "notes": [
+    "Structured log fields enforced by TransferLogRecord: fixture_id, seed, mode, env_fingerprint, artifact_refs, reason_code.",
+    "Packet reason-code registry locked via TRANSFER_PACKET_REASON_CODES and round-trip replay-log assertions.",
+    "No additional source edits were required; existing fnp-iter unit/property coverage satisfied packet-E acceptance once evidence artifacting was completed."
+  ]
+}
